residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 501-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: GH1 catalytic motif mapping plus a ProteinGym AF2 structure-derived catalytic-site shell.
evidence: The active_site_neighborhood group is a +/-2 residue window around the curated Glu178 and Glu383 catalytic-site candidates. The structure_catalytic_shell_5a group was derived from data/proteingym/structures/Q59976_STRSQ.pdb using scripts/derive_residue_shell.py and includes residues with any heavy atom within 5.0 Angstrom of either curated catalytic glutamate. The source record is data/proteingym/source_records/Q59976_STRSQ_catalytic_shell_5A.json.
